ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "cdate" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "cp" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "pctlead" REAL /* Percentage change in closing price for the next day */,
  "pctlag1" REAL /* Percentage change in closing price for the previous day */,
  "pctlag2" REAL /* Percentage change in closing price for two days ago */,
  "pctlag4" REAL /* Percentage change in closing price for four days ago */,
  "pctlag8" REAL /* Percentage change in closing price for eight days ago */,
  "upf" REAL /* Upper frequency component of the closing price */,
  "lowf" REAL /* Lower frequency component of the closing price */,
  "stock_symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded on the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the entry */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "stock_symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector to which the company belongs */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index in which the stock is listed */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country in which the company is headquartered */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_symbols_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_symbols_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of all companies in the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500, NASDAQ) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of all stocks in the index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the prediction model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prediction model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used in the model (e.g., Linear Regression, Random Forest) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "last_trained_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last trained */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_trained_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last trained the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_models_last_trained_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_trained_by_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_models_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction model */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data entry used for the prediction */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value (e.g., future stock price) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used for the prediction */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data used for the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES prediction_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)
